title: Insufficient Access Control
description: Without clear information on access control mechanisms, it’s possible users could be granted elevated privileges unintentionally or through vulnerabilities. This could allow an attacker to gain unauthorized access to sensitive data or functionality.
affected_component: Web Application, Database Server, System Services
attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the access control logic, misconfigured permissions, or privilege escalation flaws.
mitigations: Implement the principle of least privilege, granting users only the minimum necessary permissions.
Regularly review and audit user access rights.
Utilize a robust access control framework with proper authentication and authorization mechanisms.
